positive: A stylized, whimsical forest scene featuring friendly, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna. The main subject is a group of diverse forest creatures (e.g., deer, foxes, owls, rabbits) interacting peacefully under massive, stylized mushroom caps. The style should be modern vector art illustration, reminiscent of intricate Japanese woodblock prints mixed with clean geometric design. Use deep emerald, sapphire blue, and burnt orange for a jewel-toned palette. Composition must be circular and balanced for a central chest print, utilizing negative space effectively. The lines should be strong, clean, and suitable for single-color linocut or screen print transfer, ensuring high contrast silhouette work. Flat lighting, high saturation, graphic novel aesthetic, seamless repeat potential.
